zh.lifeSummary: 當John Strivelyn of Rathoran於1283年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親William de Striveling21歲，母親Mrs. William de Strivelyn17歲。他和Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1339年7月7日在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Strivelyn of Rathoran于1283年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾时，他的父亲William de Striveling21岁，母亲Mrs. William de Strivelyn17岁。他和Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1339年7月7日在英国苏格兰培爾享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Strivelyn of Rathoran was born in 1283, in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William de Striveling, was 21 and his mother, Mrs. William de Strivelyn, was 17. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran. He died on 7 July 1339, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Strivelyn of Rathoran est né en 1283, à Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Striveling, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William de Strivelyn, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran. Il est décédé le 7 juillet 1339, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Strivelyn of Rathoran 1283 in Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Striveling 21 und seine Mutter Mrs. William de Strivelyn 17. Er hatte mit Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Juli 1339 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Strivelyn of Rathoran è nato il nel 1283 nel Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Striveling, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William de Strivelyn, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran. Morì il 7 luglio 1339, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Strivelyn of Rathoran(이)가 1283년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Striveling(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William de Strivelyn(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1339년 7월 7일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Strivelyn of Rathoran nasceu em 1283, em Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Striveling, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William de Strivelyn, tinha 17 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Strivelyn of Rathoran родился в 1283 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Striveling было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William de Strivelyn, 17. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran. Он умер 7 июля 1339 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Strivelyn of Rathoran nació en 1283, en Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Striveling, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs. William de Strivelyn, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran. Murió el 7 de julio de 1339, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
